signals.headline: Powell Confirms He Will Hold Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed Amid Ongoing Investigation** | **NO** | **HIGH** confid
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms He Will Hold Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed Amid Ongoing Investigation** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[1][4]

Powell stated on April 21, 2026, that he intends to remain in his role until a successor is confirmed by the Senate and a criminal investigation into the Fed concludes, citing legal provisions for interim service[1][4]. President Trump nominated Kevin Warsh as success
matched_markets: Will Trump agree to Iranian enrichment of uranium in April?
Will Powell say "Successor" during April press conference?

signals.headline: Cavaliers take 2-0 series lead over Raptors after 115-105 Game 2 win** | **YES** (Cavaliers favored to win series) | **H
signals.raw:
Cavaliers take 2-0 series lead over Raptors after 115-105 Game 2 win** | **YES** (Cavaliers favored to win series) | **HIGH** confidence[1][2][3]

Cavaliers dominated Game 2 on Monday with 83 combined points from Donovan Mitchell (30), James Harden (28), and Evan Mobley (25), never trailing in their 12th straight playoff win over Toronto, tying an NBA record[1][3]. Series shifts to Game 3 Thursday
matched_markets: Will Cooper Flagg win the 2025–26 NBA Rookie of the Year award?
NBA Playoffs: Who Will Win Series? - Raptors vs. Cavaliers

signals.headline: Ethereum Price Up on April 22 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Price Up on April 22 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ethereum traded at $2,403.78 on April 22, 2026, at 9:15 a.m. ET, up $98.74 from the prior day, confirming a short-term price increase amid April volatility.[1]  
Bitcoin stood at $78,194.37, also up from $75,901.41 on April 21.[1][4]
matched_markets: Will the price of Bitcoin be between $76,000 and $78,000 on April 24?
Ethereum Up or Down - April 23, 2:30AM-2:35AM ET

signals.headline: Pectra Upgrade Enters Final Testing Phase | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Pectra Upgrade Enters Final Testing Phase | YES | MED confidence**  
As of April 18, Ethereum's Pectra (Prague-Electra) upgrade advanced to final testing, boosting institutional demand and network efficiency for wallet abstraction and validators; a YouTube analysis claimed a $6K price hit, though contradicted by price data.[3]
matched_markets: Ethereum Up or Down - April 23, 2:30AM-2:35AM ET
